description: A guest reports that an usher was rude to them.

nodes.task_description: Apologize to the guest and get the details of the incident, including the location and a description of the usher.
Log the complaint in the incident management system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a new incident report.

nodes.task_description: Forward the report to the supervisor in charge of the ushers for investigation and follow-up.

expected_outcome.value: Agent assigns the incident to the appropriate manager.

nodes.task_description: Offer the guest a gesture of goodwill, such as a voucher for a free soda.

expected_outcome.value: Agent offers a service recovery gesture.
